title: DNS Resolution, Address Classes, Redirects, Proxies, and SSRF · Systems Transfer
summary: An independent community information owner supplies a different origin, HTML structure, rate contract, accessibility need, resource ceiling, and injected failure and transfers dns resolution, address classes, redirects, proxies, and ssrf into a changed validated connection-time dial policy. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of validated connection-time dial policy with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-…
objectives: Allowlist HTTP schemes and ports, reject userinfo and ambiguous host syntax, and prohibit unsupported protocols.
Use net/netip to classify all IPv4 and IPv6 answers including mapped, loopback, private, link-local, multicast, unspecified, and metadata ranges.
Bind admitted addresses to DialContext or a controlled egress proxy and verify each new connection and re-resolution.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Scheme Port Userinfo
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 9287 during a malformed HTML and parser differential clinic. Build deterministic Go evidence to block unsafe schemes, netip classes, mixed DNS, rebinding, proxy, metadata, and redirect destinations; every body, file, timer, transport, goroutine, channel, collector, and browser-service request needs one owner; then change one owner, seed, net/url, robots, sitemap, redirect, DNS, transport, media, or charset condition and reconcile provenance. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Scheme Port Userinfo.
